headline: Mark Zuckerberg's Meta Platforms Dodges $8 Billion Trial With Eleventh-Hour Settlement
summary: Meta has reached a settlement with its shareholders and company leadership, thereby avoiding an $8 billion trial.

headline: Elon Musk Predicts AI 'Will Increase Birth Rates in Order To Maximize Future Light Cone of Neurotransmitter Tonnage'
summary: Elon Musk has made a bold prediction that artificial intelligence will increase birth rates.

headline: When Jamie Dimon's Daughter Asked If They Have To 'Sleep On Streets' After He Was Fired From Citigroup: 'It Was My Net Worth, Not My Self-Worth...'
summary: Jamie Dimon, recently shared a personal anecdote about the day he was fired from Citigroup and the impact it had on his family and career.

headline: Palantir, Nvidia & Tempus AI Could Be Pharma ETF Darlings That Don't Make Pills
summary: Sci-fi becomes reality: AI-native pharma disruptors like Palantir, Tempus, and Recursion are reshaping medicine. But ETFs still favor old-school giants.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: T-Mobile, LendingTree, Molina Healthcare — And Trade Deal Optimism Boosts Markets
summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors' favorite stocks over the last week — here's a look at some of our top stories.

headline: Alphabet's Waymo Cleared As NHTSA Closes 14-Month Robotaxi Safety Probe
summary: NHTSA closed a 14-month investigation into Alphabet Inc.'s Waymo self-driving vehicles due to minor collisions & unexpected behavior.

headline: Microsoft Probes Possible Breach of Its Cyber Threat Notification System After Suspected Chinese Hack: Report
summary: Microsoft Corp. is investigating its early alert system leak, to analyze any exploitation done by the Chinese hackers.

headline: OpenAI Chairman Says Only Tech Giants Can Afford New AI Models—Startups Should Focus On Applications
summary: OpenAI chairman Bret Taylor warns of the high costs of developing new AI models and advises collaboration with established companies.

headline: Mark Zuckerberg Names OpenAI Veteran Shengjia Zhao As Chief Scientist Of Meta Superintelligence Labs
summary: Meta has appointed former OpenAI researcher Shengjia Zhao as Chief Scientist of its new Superintelligence Labs.

headline: Elon Musk's Tesla To Include Shareholder Proposal On xAI Investment In Proxy After Receiving Multiple Requests
summary: Tesla confirmed it has received multiple shareholder proposals regarding a potential investment in Elon Musk's AI startup xAI.

headline: Gary Black Questions Tesla Robotaxi Hype Ahead Of Bay Area Launch: 'FSD Is Not Fully Autonomous So Can't Be Scaled Nationally'
summary: Gary Black expressed skepticism about Tesla's robotaxi test in SF. Black says FSD cannot be fully autonomous until safety driver is removed.
